events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Pax Stone wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Gale Frost asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.

Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.

expeditions.narrative: Expedition launched: Gale Frost, Echo Vale, Echo Vale, Dax Iron venture into the Martian wastes. The expedition returns empty-handed — harsh terrain and worse luck. LOSS: Echo Vale did not return. Cause: equipment failure on expedition. Survivors carry the weight of loss, bound together.
